final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo for a Weibo news/hot-topic banner image.

Style/medium: documentary photography, photojournalistic style, smartphone-like field capture
Composition: wide panoramic banner, 16:9 aspect ratio, horizontal extension with ample negative space for text overlay
Subject: city skyline at dusk, pedestrians in motion
Scene/backdrop: urban skyline at dusk, neon lights beginning to glow, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset glow
Lighting/mood: dramatic light and shadow contrast, golden hour transitioning to neon, strong sense of real presence
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" (large headline, prominent placement, bold or modern typeface), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (subtext), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom or lower-right)
Constraints: horizontal layout optimized for text overlay, professional and premium quality
Avoid:
